caption:
✨ So, I never thought a simple library study session could get this interesting... 📚👀

I adjusted my oversized cardigan, feeling the cool fabric slide over my skin as I scanned the crowded reading room. My students were scattered around, but eyes kept drifting my way, drawn to the curves my clothes were designed to highlight. The oversized blazer hid everything I wanted to keep secret, but the fitted tank underneath whispered secrets of what lay beneath.

The librarian, an older woman with a sharp gaze, tapped her clipboard against the table. "You're late for your own lecture, Ms. Rossi," she said with a smirk.

I smiled back, feeling a thrill run down my spine. "Just finishing up a surprise," I murmured, leaning in. As I stretched, the cardigan slipped, revealing just a teasing glimpse of what I had tucked away, hidden but undeniable.

The room seemed to hold its breath. The air felt thick with anticipation, my heart pounding against my ribs. In the chaos of whispered questions and rustling pages, I was the center of a very different kind of attention.

#UniversityLife #TeacherSecrets #CurvesOnCam #StudySession #RomanticTension #OversizedStyle #ProfessorMode ✨🔥
